# Generated code — DO NOT EDIT

Files here are code-generated from the single source of truth
`schemas/jsonschema/prompt-definition.schema.json` (constitution C-07).

Regenerate: `bash crates/prompting-press-core/scripts/codegen.sh` (or `moon run prompting-press-core:codegen`).
CI fails on any hand-edit or drift (`moon run schemas:codegen-check`).

`prompt_definition.rs` is produced by `cargo-typify` (the schema's `variants.propertyNames`
rule is stripped for typify and enforced instead by the schema-validation gate).
